workflow.name: NATS JetStream HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate NATS JetStream HA from an existing automation runner and target inventory.

data.label: Prepare NATS JetStream inventory
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y ansible sshpass
cat >/tmp/nats_jetstream-inventory.ini <<'INVENTORY'
[nats_jetstream]
10.31.99.11 role=nats name=nats-jetstream-01
10.31.99.12 role=nats name=nats-jetstream-02
10.31.99.13 role=nats name=nats-jetstream-03
INVENTORY

data.label: Install NATS JetStream container runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/nats_jetstream-runtime.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: nats_jetstream
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.shell: |
        if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          docker --version
          exit 0
        fi
        if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          apt-get update
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        fi
        systemctl enable --now docker
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/nats_jetstream-inventory.ini /tmp/nats_jetstream-runtime.yml

data.label: Render NATS JetStream cluster manifests
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/nats_jetstream-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: nats_jetstream
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/octastack/nats_jetstream
        state: directory
        mode: "0750"
    - ansible.builtin.copy:
        dest: /opt/octastack/nats_jetstream/compose.yml
        mode: "0640"
        content: |
          services:
            nats:
              image: nats:2.10
              container_name: octastack-nats
              restart: unless-stopped
              command: "-js -m 8222"
              ports:
                - "4222:4222"
                - "8222:8222"
              volumes:
                - data:/data
          volumes:
            data: {}
PLAYBOOK

data.label: Deploy NATS JetStream cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >>/tmp/nats_jetstream-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/nats_jetstream/compose.yml pull
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/nats_jetstream/compose.yml up -d
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/nats_jetstream/compose.yml ps
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/nats_jetstream-inventory.ini /tmp/nats_jetstream-deploy.yml

data.label: Document NATS JetStream topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/nats_jetstream-topology.md <<'EOF'
# NATS JetStream HA topology

Members:
- nats-jetstream-01: 10.31.99.11 (nats)
- nats-jetstream-02: 10.31.99.12 (nats)
- nats-jetstream-03: 10.31.99.13 (nats)

This example deploys one NATS JetStream container per member host. Replace the placeholder commands with vendor-supported clustering, TLS, backup, and failover automation before production use.
EOF
cat /tmp/nats_jetstream-topology.md

data.label: Validate NATS JetStream cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
ansible -i /tmp/nats_jetstream-inventory.ini nats_jetstream -b -m shell -a 'docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'
